description_long: This object is a modern Samsung mobile phone with a sleek, slim profile and a glossy blue finish. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels, showing a vivid wallpaper of a starry night sky over a mountain landscape. The back is smooth and reflective, with the 'SAMSUNG' logo centered and a single camera module with flash positioned near the top. The sides are gently curved, with visible buttons likely for power and volume control. The phone's construction appears to be primarily glass and metal, giving it a premium look and feel. Its compact size and ergonomic design make it suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek blue Samsung mobile phone with a large edge-to-edge display and a glossy, reflective back featuring a single camera and logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the expansive display with a starry night wallpaper and minimal bezels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the phone's slim profile and curved edges, with buttons visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the glossy blue surface, centered 'SAMSUNG' logo, and single camera module with flash.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the thinness and smooth curvature of the phone's body.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed 'SAMSUNG' text centered on the back in white.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a wallpaper of a starry night sky above a mountain landscape, with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Single camera module with flash located near the top center of the back.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker.
